items.caption: A bottle of wine with a label that features a detailed illustration of a castle. the label is predominantly white with black text and graphics. the text reads "pinto bianco" at the top, followed by "castello di amorosa" below it. there is a crest or coat of arms with a lion and a shield, and the text "2012" is visible at the bottom. the background of the label includes a depiction of a castle and a landscape, suggesting the wine may be from a winery with a castle. the bottle is placed on a surface that appears to be a countertop or table. the style of the image is a close-up product photograph with a focus on the wine label.
